arts.ttl: Le Havre targeting a loan move for Starsbourg’s Junior Mwanga
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Le Havre are aiming to complete a loan move that would see Junior Mwanga (21) arrive from Strasbourg until the end of the season. The former Bordeaux defender…

arts.ttl: Saïdou Sow set to join Nantes on loan from Strasbourg
arts.sum: According to Foot Mercato, Saïdou Sow (22) is set to join FC Nantes on loan from Strasbourg until the end of the season. The agreement between the two Ligue 1 clubs…

arts.ttl: Slot's father critical of Liverpool win over Lille
arts.sum: Arne Slot's dad wasn't impressed with Liverpool's win over Lille in the Champions League saying "it wasn't as exciting as other games of Liverpool."

Lille comes into this fixture off the back of a taxing midweek Champions League tie against Liverpool, which ended their remarkable 21-match unbeaten run across all competitions. The physical and emot...

arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Predictions | Round 19: Nice face Marseille and Strasbourg host Lille

arts.ttl: Official | Nottingham Forest’s Andrew Omobamidele completes Strasbourg switch
arts.sum: RC Strasbourg Alsace have confirmed the arrival of Andrew Omobamidele (22). The Irishman joins from Nottingham Forest on a loan deal that the French club have the option to make…

arts.ttl: Man Utd’s ominous transfer messages from Jonathan David as ‘dream’ next club picked
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly pursuing Lille's Jonathan David but the in-demand striker's comments suggest that a transfer will be unlikely for several reasons
